field: 生成图像检测 (Generated / AI-Synthesized Image Detection)
_source: All nodes fetched from OpenAlex via scripts/papers.py (real ids, years, citations as of 2026-06). Edges grounded by expanding hubs W3034577585 and W4386071953.

nodes.title: Detection of GAN-Generated Fake Images over Social Networks
nodes.problem: 社交网络上传播的GAN生成图像难以溯源/识别
nodes.contribution: 发现GAN生成图像残留可检测的模型指纹，奠基判别式检测

nodes.title: Attributing Fake Images to GANs: Learning and Analyzing GAN Fingerprints
nodes.problem: 不仅要判真假，还要归因到具体哪个GAN
nodes.contribution: 形式化“GAN指纹”，实现对生成模型的来源归因

nodes.title: Unmasking DeepFakes with simple Features
nodes.problem: 像素域检测器对新生成器泛化差
nodes.contribution: 改从频谱(DFT)看上采样伪影，开启频域检测路线

nodes.title: CNN-Generated Images Are Surprisingly Easy to Spot… for Now
nodes.problem: 如何让检测器跨不同GAN架构泛化
nodes.contribution: 单一ResNet+强数据增广，仅用ProGAN训练即可跨多种GAN泛化，成为最强基线

nodes.title: Leveraging Frequency Analysis for Deep Fake Image Recognition
nodes.problem: GAN上采样在频域留下系统性伪影
nodes.contribution: 用DCT频谱特征做检测，理论化频域路线

nodes.title: Towards Universal Fake Image Detectors that Generalize Across Generative Models
nodes.problem: 在GAN上训练的检测器无法泛化到扩散模型
nodes.contribution: 改用冻结的CLIP/ViT特征空间+轻量分类，跨GAN与扩散通用检测

nodes.title: DIRE for Diffusion-Generated Image Detection
nodes.problem: 扩散模型生成图像缺乏GAN式指纹，旧检测器失效
nodes.contribution: 用扩散重建误差(DIRE)作为通用判据检测扩散生成图

nodes.title: On The Detection of Synthetic Images Generated by Diffusion Models
nodes.problem: 频域/forensics方法在扩散时代是否仍然有效
nodes.contribution: 系统分析扩散图像的伪影，把GAN时代的取证经验迁移到扩散

nodes.title: Raising the Bar of AI-generated Image Detection with CLIP
nodes.problem: CLIP特征检测的上限与最佳实践尚不清楚
nodes.contribution: 系统化CLIP-based通用检测，刷新跨生成器泛化SOTA

nodes.title: Forgery-aware Adaptive Transformer for Generalizable Synthetic Image Detection
nodes.problem: 如何让Transformer检测器对未见生成器自适应泛化
nodes.contribution: 前向感知自适应Transformer(FatFormer)，强化跨生成器泛化

nodes.title: AEROBLADE: Training-Free Detection of Latent Diffusion Images Using Autoencoder Reconstruction Error
nodes.problem: 需要无需训练即可检测潜在扩散图像
nodes.contribution: 用自编码器重建误差实现免训练检测，延续DIRE思路

nodes.title: Synthetic Image Detection with CLIP: Understanding and Assessing
nodes.problem: CLIP-based检测为何有效、何时失效尚缺乏理解
nodes.contribution: 系统剖析CLIP检测器的机制与失效模式，为通用检测建立可解释基础
